spawn.evidence: bunx smithers-orchestrator up probe-workflow.tsx -d returned run ID and pid for two concurrent runs (probe-voice-steer-a/b-1781412619451)
spawn.finding: Durable runs spawn reliably with stable run IDs

persist.evidence: 29 panopticon-process runs in waiting-event state created 2026-06-13 20:38-21:42 still alive at 2026-06-14 04:54 (8+ hours). SQLite _smithers_runs table confirms durable storage.
persist.finding: WaitForEvent state persists durably in SQLite across process restarts

concurrent.evidence: Both probe runs reached waiting-event independently in 2.4s and 2.7s. 29 concurrent panopticon-process runs exist in DB.
concurrent.finding: No mutual exclusion between runs; concurrent spawn and operation proven

signal.evidence: smithers signal probe-voice-steer-a steer returned status:signalled. After resume: _smithers_attempts shows steer|0|finished, step|0|finished, steer|1|waiting-event. Loop iteration advanced 0->1.
signal.finding: Signal delivery is durable (stored in _smithers_signals); loop advances on resume; gateway mode processes signals in real-time (smoke-1781396596009: 3 iterations in 26s)

voiceSeam.installCommand: git clone https://github.com/jameslbarnes/cue && cd cue && pnpm install && pnpm build
voiceSeam.finding: Cue is accessible on GitHub (HTTP 200). Private pnpm monorepo; must build from source. Adapter code (WordCue -> MappedActionTool -> smithers signal) is complete and type-correct.

architecturalNote: Real-time voice control requires gateway deployment (smithers up --serve), not detach mode (up -d). In gateway mode, WaitForEvent signals are processed immediately without --resume. The existing .smithers/gateway.ts is the correct runtime. The adapter must call the gateway signal API, not the CLI.
planImpact: Smithers gates: no plan changes needed. Two setup tasks: (1) install-cue-from-source before Cue integration tests; (2) clarify that Panopticon processes launch via gateway, not standalone up -d. Both are setup tasks, not design changes.
